reviews.comment:
Limpieza buen parque con sombra para caminar con mascotas y buena atención del personal . Yo paro cada vez que viajo a buenos aires.de mi suegra.

(Translated by Google)
Clean, nice park with shade for walking with pets and good service from the staff. I stop here every time I travel to Buenos Aires. (My mother-in-law's place.)

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Los playeros no hacen respetar el sentido de circulación de los vehículos. Estas haciendo la cola y los "amigos" del playero José se cuelan de contramano, cuando le reclamas el maleducado te dice que te calles. Los socios somos giles, pagamos para que nos forreen.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster. The attendants don't enforce the traffic flow. You're waiting in line and José's "friends" cut in going the wrong way, and when you complain, the rude guy tells you to shut up. We members are suckers; we pay to get ripped off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbWRHUF93RRAB
